name: Sea of Primordial Essence
descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG to all enemies, this DMG enjoys [Arg4]x {STR} bonus. Create 1 Customized {Thousand Mirage} and place it into hand. If it is not an {Ultra Round} and there is no {Thousand Mirage} in the {Ultra Space}, copy it and place it into the {Ultra Space}. Otherwise, place 1 {Insight} into hand.
